name: employee-management-workspace
description: Root workspace for managing Employee Management backend and frontend together

scripts.start: npx -y concurrently --kill-others -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue.bold,magenta.bold" "dotnet watch --project backend/EmployeeManagement.api --launch-profile https" "npm run start --prefix frontend/employee-management-ui"
scripts.start:no-watch: npx -y concurrently --kill-others -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue.bold,magenta.bold" "dotnet run --project backend/EmployeeManagement.api --launch-profile https" "npm run start --prefix frontend/employee-management-ui"
